name: Baron Zaudrus
location: Baron Zaudrus in The Cauldron, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat: Applying a status effect to an enemy grants you a stack of Zaudrus's Ambition for 10 seconds, up to 3 stacks max. When you gain 3 stacks, the stacks are removed and you gain 4 Ultimate. On gaining Ultimate, you cannot gain additional stacks of Zaudrus's Ambition for 1 second.
